name: Mojito
description: A classic Mojito made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime, mint, soda, and sugar syrup. This Original Mojito cocktail recipe blends BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime, mint, and a touch of sweetness. Whether you're mixing a single glass or a pitcher for friends, follow these simple steps to create a Mojito that's sure to impress!
recipe_steps: In a highball glass, add BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime juice, sugar syrup, and soda water.
Add mint leaves to the glass, gently pressing with a bar spoon to release their oils. Leave the spoon in the glass.
Fill 3/4 of the glass with crushed ice. Churn the mixture with a bar spoon to combine. Top with crushed ice.
Garnish with a fresh mint sprig. Serve immediately and enjoy your perfectly crafted BACARDÍ Mojito!
searchable_text: Mojito main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca A classic Mojito made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime, mint, soda, and sugar syrup. This Original Mojito cocktail recipe blends BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime, mint, and a touch of sweetness. Whether you're mixing a single glass or a pitcher for friends, follow these simple steps to create a Mojito that's sure to impress! ingredients 50 ML BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 25 ML fresh lime juice, 25 ML soda, 15 ML sugar syrup (1:1), small handful mint, crushed ice recipe steps In a highball glass, add BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime juice, sugar syrup, and soda water. Add mint leaves to the glass, gently pressing with a bar spoon to release their oils. Leave the spoon in the glass. Fill 3/4 of the glass with crushed ice. Churn the mixture with a bar spoon to combine. Top with crushed ice. Garnish with a fresh mint sprig. Serve immediately and enjoy your perfectly crafted BACARDÍ Mojito!
